misconceptions.label: Force and pressure are the same
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner treats force and pressure as interchangeable.

misconceptions.label: Larger area always means larger pressure
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner reverses the P = F/A relationship for area.

misconceptions.label: Friction is always harmful
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner ignores useful roles of friction (walking, holding).

misconceptions.label: Plant and animal cells are identical
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner does not distinguish cell wall/chloroplast/vacuole differences.

misconceptions.label: Nucleus is optional in living cells
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner underestimates nucleus control of cell activities.

misconceptions.label: Combustion can occur without oxygen
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner omits oxygen requirement for combustion.

misconceptions.label: Ignition temperature is the boiling point
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner confuses ignition temperature with boiling/melting point.

misconceptions.label: Sound travels through vacuum
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner believes sound needs no medium.

misconceptions.label: Reflection and refraction are the same
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner conflates bounce (reflection) with medium change (refraction).

misconceptions.label: All microorganisms are harmful
misconceptions.evidence_template: Learner ignores fermentation, nitrogen fixation, and vaccine uses.

interventions.title: Visual: P = F/A
interventions.description: Show force on large vs small area with diagram; keep formula from STEM engine.

interventions.title: Worked example: pressure
interventions.description: Step-through calculation with units; official bank practice after.

interventions.title: Concrete area activity
interventions.description: Compare thumb vs palm pressing on soft clay or sponge.

interventions.title: Official pressure practice
interventions.description: Pull official MCQs for Force and Pressure from question bank.

interventions.title: Plant vs animal cell diagram
interventions.description: Use NCERT/biology SVG pack; alt-text required.

interventions.title: Compare cell structures
interventions.description: Two-column scaffold: plant vs animal features.

interventions.title: AI Tutor: cell organelles
interventions.description: Targeted tutor mode on nucleus/chloroplast; facts from knowledge layer.

interventions.title: AI Tutor: useful friction
interventions.description: Discuss walking/holding examples after concept check.

interventions.title: Friction benefits vs drawbacks
interventions.description: Dual list graphic; presentation only.

interventions.title: Combustion requirements
interventions.description: Fuel + oxygen + ignition temperature triangle.

interventions.title: Fire triangle visual
interventions.description: Accessible diagram of combustion conditions.

interventions.title: Ignition temperature glossary
interventions.description: Contrast ignition vs melting vs boiling with examples.

interventions.title: Official combustion items
interventions.description: Official bank items for Combustion and Flame.

interventions.title: Sound needs a medium
interventions.description: Bell-in-jar style explanation (verified curriculum).

interventions.title: AI Tutor: sound waves
interventions.description: Short tutor check on vacuum misconception.

interventions.title: Reflection vs refraction diagram
interventions.description: Side-by-side ray diagrams from knowledge figures.

interventions.title: Compare reflection and refraction
interventions.description: Fill-in table with verified definitions.

interventions.title: Useful vs harmful microbes
interventions.description: Sort cards: curd/yeast vs disease examples from NCERT.

interventions.title: AI Tutor: microorganisms
interventions.description: Formative dialogue on friend and foe roles.

interventions.title: Teacher check-in
interventions.description: Flag learner for small-group reteach.

interventions.title: Home practice suggestion
interventions.description: Short retrieval practice (5–10 min) using official items only.

interventions.title: EF checklist
interventions.description: Step checklist for multi-step science problems.
